questions.q: According to a recent report, what percentage of white-collar professionals are reportedly refusing to adopt AI tools despite employer mandates?
questions.correctText: A staggering 80% of white-collar professionals are reportedly refusing to adopt AI tools.

questions.q: What event is scheduled to resume on Sunday, April 13, 2026, following the lifting of a state of emergency in Israel?
According to the International Union for Conservation of Nature (IUCN), what is the primary threat leading to the risk of extinction for Emperor Penguins?
options: Mass drowning of chicks due to melting sea ice
questions.correctText: Mass drowning of chicks due to melting sea ice.

questions.q: What was the revised annualized growth rate of the U.S. economy in the fourth quarter, according to the Commerce Department's final estimate?
questions.correctText: Gross domestic product increased at a downwardly revised 0.5 per cent annualized rate, the Commerce Department's Bureau of Economic Analysis said in its third GDP estimate.

questions.q: What government agency recently issued a warning to U.S. internet users to reboot their routers due to attackers targeting home networks?
questions.correctText: The National Security Agency (NSA) issued a warning to reboot internet routers.

questions.q: A recent study, reported today, indicates that coercive control in relationships is often viewed as less harmful when the victim is a what?
questions.correctText: Research from April 9, 2026, indicates that people tend to view coercive control as less harmful when the victim is a man.

questions.q: In Florida, a teen has been charged with murder after a sex offender's body was found in what condition and location?
options: Stuffed in a suitcase and left in a remote area
Buried in a shallow grave in a backyard
Dismembered and scattered in a public park
Thrown into a canal with weights attached
questions.correctText: Lucas Sander Jones, of Indialantic, is charged with the murder of 28-year-old Colie Lee Daniel, who was reported missing on March 22, according to an arrest affidavit obtained by Fox13. Daniel's remains were discovered inside the suitcase that was abandoned in an undeveloped 2,784-acre area known locally as “The Compound.”

questions.q: What Canadian bank announced on April 9, 2026, its plan to launch a growth fund to invest up to $1 billion in Canadian companies?
questions.correctText: On April 9, 2026, RBC announced its plan to launch a growth fund to invest up to $1 billion in Canadian companies.

questions.q: The U.S. Postal Service announced it is suspending contributions to which employee pension plan to conserve cash amidst a severe financial crisis?
questions.correctText: The U.S. Postal Service is suspending its contributions to the Federal Employees Retirement System, a pension plan for its workers and other civil servants, as the agency struggles with mounting losses.

questions.q: According to news from April 9, 2026, what social factor is linked to a lower risk of cancer, particularly for men?
questions.correctText: News from April 9, 2026, indicates that marriage is linked to a lower risk of cancer, especially among men.
